changes: Introduce a wizard navigation flow to guide game managers sequentially through setup tabs
Add interactive 'Continue to Format' and 'Continue to Timing & Rules' outline buttons at the bottom of the tab content cards
Add subtle amber unreviewed notification dots to tabs that have not yet been visited
Display a friendly, non-blocking recommendation tip next to the Start button if the tournament is ready but configuration tabs have not been reviewed
Restore the Round Robin rounds selection dropdown for 8-player / 2-court events
Update rounds projection statistics and default mixer recommendation badge to respect custom Round Robin rounds count
Update tournament start scheduler to support custom generated Round Robin round counts for 8-player / 2-court configurations
Improve setup phone number field clarity and layout
Add interactive outline SVG user and phone icons inside the roster text fields
Introduce a helper tips banner explaining that phone numbers are used to text match schedules and court updates
Provide a clear phone format placeholder (e.g. 555-555-5555) for consistent inputs
Redesign tournament setup screen with modern tabbed segmented controls and premium animations
Introduce smooth input focus glows and a slide switch toggle component for Mixed Mode
Optimize mobile sticky bottom bar layout to free up screen real estate when editing rosters
Upgrade interface buttons with high-quality outline vector SVG icons
Calibrate default round duration to 11–20 minutes under side-out to 11 (win by 2) scoring systems
Update default side-out PPM to 1.6 and align all time-budget solver algorithms
Bypass service worker completely for changelog requests (version.json and version-metadata.json) to solve cross-version network loading errors
Restore backward-compatible version.json on the server to support older app clients
Rename changelog file to version-metadata.json to completely bypass client service worker caching
Configure network-first cache bypass pattern in service worker fetch listeners
Fix PWA upgrade card changes diff to display latest version updates by default
Calibrate tournament duration estimates: side-out to 11 matches default to 10–20 minutes (avg 15m)
Recalibrate time-budget solver to prevent overly pessimistic time ranges
Generalized Roster Manager help text and placeholders for all league formats
Minor user experience refinements on setup views
View full version history and release notes in Settings modal
Dynamic release notes display relative to your current app version
Manage active rosters using the new Roster Manager tool
Load players from Lifetime Stats club list or save custom Tuesday/Thursday templates
Rename and customize court names in setup and mid-tournament settings modal
View games, byes, and partner mix projections in the Format tab
Sleek slide-up notification panel for new app updates
Redesigned setup layout with tabs (Players & Courts, Format, Timing & Rules)
Customize court names directly in the setup screen
Start time dropdown in user-friendly 15-minute intervals
Scoring system defaults to Traditional side-out for new tournaments
Reordered Timing & Rules tab with rules-on-top and estimates card at the bottom
Detailed math breakdown in collapsible 'How is this calculated?' section
Relocated Mixed Mode card to Players & Courts tab
Added clear context messages for Mixed Mode ON vs OFF pairing behavior
Dynamic tournament duration and likely-finish estimates
Adjust scoring mechanics (Traditional vs Rally) directly in Timing & Rules
Format tab reordered with Format selection at the very top
Collapsed templates and presets in quick-access accordion
